meaning: conj.因而,所以,那么,这样看来adv.[表示程度] 如此,那么,非常,很,[表示方式] 这样,那样,如此,因此 [域] Somalia ,索马里
examples: She is always so chic, so elegant.
Chris is so ambitious, so determined to do it all.
She wanted him to stop being so cool, so detached, so cynical.
So for all the talk, all the money, the troops have had little to do.
No one has counted but so many tell stories that it must be thousands and thousands.
